ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "unit_system" TEXT /* Unit system preference (e.g., metric, imperial) */,
  "notification_preference" INTEGER /* Notification preference (true for on, false for off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the activity data */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total steps taken by the user */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the user */,
  "tracker_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled as tracked by the device */,
  "logged_activities_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during logged activities */,
  "very_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled while very active */,
  "moderately_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled while moderately active */,
  "light_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled while lightly active */,
  "sedentary_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled while sedentary */,
  "very_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in very active activities */,
  "fairly_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in fairly active activities */,
  "lightly_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in lightly active activities */,
  "sedentary_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in sedentary activities */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories burned by the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Overall activity level (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "sleep_minutes" INTEGER /* Total sleep minutes */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., steps, distance, calories) */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress towards the goal */,
  "achieved" INTEGER /* Whether the goal has been achieved (true for yes, false for no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated in the challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., step, distance, calorie burn) */,
  "challenge_value" INTEGER /* Value of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  "badge_type" TEXT /* Type of badge (e.g., step, distance, calorie burn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date the friendship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the challenge */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, trophy, prize) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
